title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
